languages.text: "И зачем кому-то запирать нас в этом мгновении? Какую цель мог преследовать уродливый разум, сотворивший это? Разве что... это пытка. Но чья?"

traits.locale_text: "И зачем кому-то запирать нас в этом мгновении? Какую цель мог преследовать уродливый разум, сотворивший это? Разве что... это пытка. Но чья?"

languages.text: "Why would anyone want to imprison us in this moment? It would take a grotesque mind to conceive of such a thing, but to what end? Unless... the goal is torture. But who is the intended victim?"
languages.original_text: "И зачем кому-то запирать нас в этом мгновении? Какую цель мог преследовать уродливый разум, сотворивший это? Разве что... это пытка. Но чья?"

traits.locale_text: "Why would anyone want to imprison us in this moment? It would take a grotesque mind to conceive of such a thing, but to what end? Unless... the goal is torture. But who is the intended victim?"
"Why would anyone want to imprison us in this moment? It would take a grotesque mind to conceive of such a thing, but to what end? Unless... the goal is torture. But who is the intended victim?"
"Why would anyone want to imprison us in this moment? It would take a grotesque mind to conceive of such a thing, but to what end? Unless... the goal is torture. But who is the intended victim?"

languages.text: “谁会想把我们囚禁在这一刻？能想出这种事的人，内心一定扭曲至极。可目的是什么？难道……是为了折磨人。那目标又是谁呢？”
languages.original_text: "Why would anyone want to imprison us in this moment? It would take a grotesque mind to conceive of such a thing, but to what end? Unless... the goal is torture. But who is the intended victim?"

traits.locale_text: “谁会想把我们囚禁在这一刻？能想出这种事的人，内心一定扭曲至极。可目的是什么？难道……是为了折磨人。那目标又是谁呢？”

languages.text: « Qui donc pourrait chercher à nous emprisonner dans les circonstances actuelles ? Seul un esprit malade peut concevoir une telle mascarade, mais à quelle fin ? À moins que l'objectif soit la torture, tout simplement. Mais dans ce cas, qui est la victime désignée ? »
languages.original_text: "Why would anyone want to imprison us in this moment? It would take a grotesque mind to conceive of such a thing, but to what end? Unless... the goal is torture. But who is the intended victim?"

traits.locale_text: « Qui donc pourrait chercher à nous emprisonner dans les circonstances actuelles ? Seul un esprit malade peut concevoir une telle mascarade, mais à quelle fin ? À moins que l'objectif soit la torture, tout simplement. Mais dans ce cas, qui est la victime désignée ? »

languages.text: "Biri bizi bu ana hapsetmeyi neden istesin ki? Böyle bir şeyi ancak grotesk bir zihin tasarlayabilir. Fakat amaç ne? Yoksa... İşkence mi etmek istiyor? Öyleyse hedef kurban kim?"
languages.original_text: "Why would anyone want to imprison us in this moment? It would take a grotesque mind to conceive of such a thing, but to what end? Unless... the goal is torture. But who is the intended victim?"

traits.locale_text: "Biri bizi bu ana hapsetmeyi neden istesin ki? Böyle bir şeyi ancak grotesk bir zihin tasarlayabilir. Fakat amaç ne? Yoksa... İşkence mi etmek istiyor? Öyleyse hedef kurban kim?"

languages.text: «¿Por qué querría nadie atraparnos en este momento? Solo una mente grotesca podría concebir tal cosa y ¿qué ganaría con ello? A menos que... su objetivo fuera la tortura. En ese caso, ¿quién es su víctima principal?».
languages.original_text: "Why would anyone want to imprison us in this moment? It would take a grotesque mind to conceive of such a thing, but to what end? Unless... the goal is torture. But who is the intended victim?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Por qué querría nadie atraparnos en este momento? Solo una mente grotesca podría concebir tal cosa y ¿qué ganaría con ello? A menos que... su objetivo fuera la tortura. En ese caso, ¿quién es su víctima principal?».

languages.text: "Warum sollte uns jemand in diesem Moment gefangen halten? Auf so etwas käme nur ein grotesker Verstand, aber wozu? Es sei denn ... er will jemanden quälen. Aber wer ist dann das Opfer?"
languages.original_text: "Why would anyone want to imprison us in this moment? It would take a grotesque mind to conceive of such a thing, but to what end? Unless... the goal is torture. But who is the intended victim?"

traits.locale_text: "Warum sollte uns jemand in diesem Moment gefangen halten? Auf so etwas käme nur ein grotesker Verstand, aber wozu? Es sei denn ... er will jemanden quälen. Aber wer ist dann das Opfer?"

languages.text: 「なぜ、この瞬間を閉じ込めることを望む人がいるのか。そんな考えを思いつくには、グロテスクな心が必要だろう。だが、その目的は？まさか…拷問の目的か。だが、その犠牲者は誰なのか？」
languages.original_text: "Why would anyone want to imprison us in this moment? It would take a grotesque mind to conceive of such a thing, but to what end? Unless... the goal is torture. But who is the intended victim?"

traits.locale_text: 「なぜ、この瞬間を閉じ込めることを望む人がいるのか。そんな考えを思いつくには、グロテスクな心が必要だろう。だが、その目的は？まさか…拷問の目的か。だが、その犠牲者は誰なのか？」
